mechanics.excerpt: Some vehicles even have their bodies and frames sculpted to the tastes of their wners The gamemaster must set the prices for these luxury' items and the availability rating will always be one 0r two levels higher than the standard ior Its type USING EQUIPMENT The following sections explain terms that define equipment (Equipment Data) and the effects encumbrance: Guidelines for repair of equipment are also provided Gray Areas There are other avenues acquiring equipment, including many that are of dubious legality: For example characters may salvage equipment from battlefield; some military types have even been known to break down entire vehicles ad ship them home piece by piece.
